name: Mini Blackbottoms
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
1 pkg Cream Cheese, 3 oz.
1 pkg Cream Cheese, 8 oz.
1/3 cup Sugar
2 Eggs
3/4 cup Mini chocolate chips
Prepare cake mix according to package directions using eggs, oil, and water. Line empty paper egg carton with mini cupcake liners (about 1 3/4 inches top diameter). Remove cream cheese from wrappers, place in small glass bowl. Microwave on Medium until softened, about 1 minute. Add sugar and eggs, beating until smooth. Stir in chocolate chips. Place a scant teaspoon of cake mix batter in cups, top with half teaspoon of filling. Cover with paper napkin. Microwave on High for 1 carton (12 muffins) for 1 minute and ten seconds, or 2 cartons (24 muffins) for 2 minutes and 45 seconds. Makes 17 dozen from the Baltimore Gas and Electric company Marketing and Energy Services.
